purpose: Campaign-level progress ledger for Polyglot deck/support/bundle work. This answers which Polyglot deck units have been planned, previewed, rendered, uploaded or intentionally skipped.
notes: This file is separate from ordinary single-target video progress because Polyglot rollout is a different campaign tactic.
One progress item should represent one deck + support language + selected Polyglot bundle.
Use the global publish calendar for physical YouTube slots; use this file for Polyglot campaign accounting.
